hero_title: Global Leader in Advanced 3rd Party Logistics
hero_subtitle: We deliver customized 3rd Party Logistics solutions, optimizing your supply chain with our top-tier expertise.
about_ideology_desc: KMTech proactively creates an environment to meet the demands and expectations of all stakeholders, taking responsibility to the very end.
tpl_biz_desc: KMTech takes full responsibility for our clients' logistics processes through our 3rd Party Logistics services. We provide one-stop solutions from storage, packaging, and inspection to delivery, utilizing state-of-the-art facilities and systematic processes, allowing our clients to focus on their core business.
tpl_warehouse_items: 3,000 pallets capacity → Reduce your inventory burden
2x 40ft container docks → Minimize unloading wait time
16-channel CCTV recording → Your assets are protected
tpl_inspection_items: 3,000 Class Clean Booth → Safe for electronics
Precision inspection & repair → Catch defects before shipment
Visual & Function Test equipment → Meet your quality standards
tpl_packaging_items: Custom repackaging → Ship-ready for your customers
50 pallets at once → Fast turnaround on bulk orders
ERP-linked QR system → Real-time inventory tracking
Sorting & classification → Tailored to your requirements
process_step_1_desc: Secure storage of products upon arrival at Jiksan Warehouse.
process_step_2_desc: Efficient unloading and preparation via dedicated container docks.
process_step_3_desc: Systematic sorting and storage of classified products.
process_step_4_desc: Careful dismantling of packaging for inspection and rework.
process_step_5_desc: Visual and functional testing to ensure quality standards.
process_step_6_desc: ERP-linked QR code scanning for accurate inventory management.
process_step_7_desc: Custom repackaging tailored to end-customer requirements.
process_step_8_desc: Loading onto trucks for final delivery to the end-customer.
contact_warehouse_address: 112-19, Gunsu 1-gil, Jiksan-eup, Seobuk-gu, Cheonan-si, Chungcheongnam-do, Korea
contact_form_desc: Have a question or want to work with us? Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_form_success_desc: Your message was prepared in your email app. Please review it there and press send.
home_services_3pl_desc: We provide comprehensive 3rd party logistics services, including warehousing, inspection, and packaging, to optimize your supply chain.
home_service_warehouse_desc: Store your inventory safely in a logistics center with 3,000-pallet capacity. ERP-linked QR inventory tracking and 16-channel CCTV help your team focus on core work.
home_service_inspection_desc: Our engineers inspect every item in a 3,000 Class Clean Booth. We catch defects before they reach your customers—reducing claims and recall risks.
home_service_packaging_desc: We repack and label to your specs, then ship directly to your destination. Simplify your supply chain with ERP-integrated real-time tracking.
strong_point_1_desc: Extensive experience with automotive tier 1 companies, with a deep understanding of their requirements and systems.
strong_point_2_desc: In-depth knowledge of both logistics and quality inspection processes.
strong_point_3_desc: A flexible, individual, and personal approach to meet each customer's unique needs.
strong_point_4_desc: Our team is composed of highly qualified and experienced professionals.
strong_point_5_desc: We perform inspection and sorting activities in conjunction with our logistics services for maximum efficiency.
strong_point_6_desc: Equipped with a state-of-the-art clean booth for high-precision inspections.
about_org_desc: Our organization is structured to provide specialized and efficient services across all business areas. Each division is led by experienced professionals dedicated to achieving customer satisfaction.
footer_description: KMTech is a leading 3PL logistics company specializing in automotive and industrial sectors. We optimize your supply chain with state-of-the-art facilities and expert professionals.
contact_form_error_desc: There was an error sending your message. Please try again later.
validation_name_required: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation_message_required: Message must be at least 10 characters
partners_hero_desc: We partner with leading companies in the global automotive and electronics industries. Through long-term partnerships built on trust, we deliver the best logistics services.
partners_section_desc: Global companies in automotive, electronics, display, and various other industries trust KMTech's professional logistics services.
partners_cta_title: Discuss the 3PL scope for your product line
partners_cta_desc: Share the scope you need across storage, inspection, repackaging, and outbound preparation, and we will respond around actual operating conditions.
error_404_desc: The page you requested does not exist or may have moved. Use the buttons below to continue.
business_operations_title: Inbound, inspection, repackaging, and outbound work in one connected flow
business_services_desc: Storage, quality inspection, repackaging, and outbound preparation are configured around each client delivery requirement.
business_delivery_items: Outbound preparation by destination to reduce delivery delays
Product condition check before vehicle loading
Loading plans aligned to client delivery requirements
Outbound confirmation based on packaging and inspection records
business_flow_desc: This is the standard workflow at the Jiksan logistics center. Detailed steps are tailored by volume and product characteristics.
metric_space_detail: Jiksan logistics center for large-volume handling
metric_dock_detail: Two 40ft containers can be unloaded at once
metric_clean_booth_detail: 3,000 Class clean booth for electronic component inspection
metric_qr_detail: QR-based inventory tracking and outbound confirmation
contact_response_note: We review 3PL, inspection, and repackaging inquiries quickly
contact_form_panel_desc: Share your volume, product category, and inspection or packaging requirements. The right contact will review and reply.
about_trust_title: KMTech operates facilities, processes, and teams as a 3PL partner
about_trust_desc: Based on the Jiksan logistics center, storage capacity, inspection, and repackaging processes support reliable client logistics.
about_trust_statement: Our operating culture is built around customer focus, confidentiality, and responsibility through the final step.
about_values_desc: KMTech values are practical standards for stable storage, inspection, repackaging, and outbound work on the floor.
about_strengths_desc: We combine facility capacity, quality management, dedicated people, and delivery response to reduce client operating burden.
business_feature_accuracy_desc: Standardized work to reduce errors and protect quality
business_feature_trace_desc: ERP QR tracking for inventory and outbound confirmation
business_feature_flexible_desc: Operations tailored by volume and product type
business_warehouse_summary: Stable operations through controlled storage conditions and systematic inventory management.
business_inspection_summary: Accurate inspection workflows help manage quality and quantity before shipment.
business_packaging_summary: Custom packaging supports safe, efficient delivery formats for each product.
business_delivery_summary: Accurate outbound preparation reduces delivery workload for client teams.
hero_visual_network: 3PL logistics network connected through the Korea hub
home_problem_title: Choose the operating issue to solve first
home_problem_desc: The home page routes common client problems to the right 3PL flow instead of listing every function at once.
home_facility_title: Actual operating base at the Jiksan logistics center
home_facility_desc: Key storage, dock, and security indicators are summarized so teams can review capacity before consultation.
home_partner_desc: Representative clients can be reviewed with industry and service-scope details on the dedicated page.
home_route_business_desc: Check storage, inspection, repackaging, and outbound preparation by process.
home_route_partners_desc: Compare client references by industry and actual service scope.
home_route_contact_desc: Start a consultation with volume, product, inspection, and packaging requirements.
business_warehouse_target: Pallet and box inventory for short- or long-term storage
business_warehouse_operation: Manage location and quantity after inbound confirmation with ERP QR
business_warehouse_output: Visible inventory status and outbound-ready quantity
business_inspection_target: Electronic parts, automotive parts, and pre-shipment quality checks
business_inspection_operation: Inspect appearance, quantity, and condition using clean booth and standards
business_inspection_output: Inspection records that reduce pre-shipment defect leakage
business_packaging_target: Products requiring relabeling, sorting, or delivery-format changes
business_packaging_operation: Repackage and label by product traits and delivery requirements
business_delivery_target: Volume requiring destination-based loading and outbound confirmation
business_delivery_operation: Prepare outbound work by destination using packaging and inspection history
business_consult_ready_desc: These details help estimate storage area, inspection method, and repackaging scope more accurately.
business_consult_check_volume_desc: Pallets, boxes, and monthly inbound/outbound frequency
business_consult_check_product_desc: Automotive, electronics, display, and handling traits
business_consult_check_quality_desc: Appearance, quantity, function, and clean-booth requirements
business_consult_check_delivery_desc: Destination, labeling, pack unit, and outbound cutoff
partners_reference_desc: We show industry and registered scope data with each client instead of only listing logos.
partners_matrix_desc: This matrix uses the registered scope across storage, inspection, rework, ERP QR, repackaging, and outbound preparation.
